title.rendered: Smarter Sales Through CRM and Document Integration

content.rendered: In this episode of “Marketing in the Now,” Chris Eustace, CEO of SparkGrid Software, discusses his company’s new integration of HubSpot and Box, aiming to boost sales productivity. He explains how this integration streamlines document management, improves compliance, and enhances efficiency for sales and customer service teams by allowing HubSpot users to manage, share, and automate document workflows directly within their CRM. The solution tackles administrative burdens, centralizes document access, and automates e-signatures, ultimately empowering sales teams to focus on selling. Listen now to learn more!
